TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/JEFF MARGUILES AS COUNSEL. DEFS. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. MICHAEL MALLONEE ALSO PRESENT AS GUARANTOR FOR DEFS. SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 21 TRUITT ST, S.F, CA. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 4-30-94 - FORF. OF RENTAL AGREEMENT - $5,000 RENT & DAMAGES & ATTY. FEES BY CASHIERS CK. OR MONEY ORDER DELIV- ERED TO MR. MARGUILES OFFICE 3-16-94, 5PM - IF DEFS. FAIL TO MAKE PMT. MONEY JUDGMENT FOR $8,300 IS ENTERED - IF DEFS. MAKE $5,000 PMT, BUT DON'T VACATE BY 4-30-94 MONEY JUDGMENT FOR $9,300 IS ENTERED - DEFS. ARE TO RETURN KEYS WITH LETTER STATING THEY HAVE VACATED - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS - NO FURTHER STAYS - DEFS. CERTIFY THERE ARE NO OTHER OCCUPANTS - PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED - PL. WILL GIVE NO NEGATIVE REFERENCES AS TO DEFS. - UPON COMPLYING WITH ALL TERM BY DEFS, PL. WILL S/A JUDGMENT & DISM W/PREJUDICE. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. Y
